hero.title: NestGen Forum '26
hero.tagline: Pioneering AI-First Drone Autonomy for Scale
hero.description: NestGen Forum is an exclusive invite-only gathering for drone pioneers tackling the toughest problems in scaling dock operations. Multi-site deployment, ROI justification, regulatory navigation, AI integration, and the shift from pilots to enterprise infrastructure. These conversations shaped NestGen Retreat. This forum brings that same caliber of conversation to AUVSI in one focused day. Curated. Peer-driven. Substance over spectacle.

opening.title: Opening: Building the Nervous System of Autonomous Operations
opening.desc: The strategic picture: how dock scaling and AI-driven intelligence are converging to reshape autonomous drone operations.

items.title: Building the ROI Playbook That Scales
items.desc: Business case frameworks and pricing models that get enterprise leadership to fund and expand drone programs.

items.title: From Pilot to Docks-as-Infrastructure
items.desc: Why single-department programs stall and how multi-department adoption changes the entire investment equation.

items.title: AI as the Business Lever
items.desc: How AI shifts the value proposition from data collection to actionable intelligence.

items.title: ROC and Shift to Outcome-Based Business Model
items.desc: Outsourcing operations, scaling through managed services, and pricing on outcomes instead of flights.

items.title: Designing the ROC for Multi-Site Scale
items.desc: Fleet management, one-to-many operations, and what breaks when you scale beyond a handful of sites.

items.title: Beyond the Flight to AI-Driven Outcomes
items.desc: Automated detection, change tracking, forensic search, and AI-generated reporting in daily operations.

items.title: BVLOS Strategies That Actually Work
items.desc: Build your own, partner under existing frameworks, or make it a vendor criterion.

items.title: Data Security, H/W & Compliance Decisions
items.desc: Cloud vs on-premises trade-offs, sovereign models, and navigating hardware choices in a shifting landscape.

closing.title: Closing: Where AI and Drone Autonomy Converge Next
closing.desc: A forward look at what happens when autonomous docks, AI, and ground robotics merge into one intelligence layer.

tracks.label: Who Should Join
tracks.description: NestGen Forum brings together enterprise drone program leaders and drone solution providers. Choose the track that matches how you spend your day.

visionary.name: Visionary Track
visionary.audience: For CEOs, Program Directors, Head of Innovation
visionary.description: Are you building the business case, choosing partners, setting strategy, or leading the organization that delivers autonomous drone services? This track is for you.

operator.name: Operator Track
operator.audience: Drone program Operators, ROC Managers, Field Teams, Pilot-in-Command
operator.description: Are you managing flights, maintaining docks, navigating airspace, scaling sites, or running a remote operations center? This track is for you.

form.heading: One power-packed day ahead of AUVSI Xponential.
form.description: No filler, no sales pitches. Seats are limited and allocated by invitation.
